title: 'New Lies Every Day': Mithun Chakraborty Dismisses Mamata Banerjee's Claim Over Bhawanipur Nomination Row
description: Mithun Chakraborty has dismissed West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee's claim regarding an alleged attempt by the BJP to cancel her nomination from Bhawanipur. He called Banerjee's allegation a false narrative.
